stages.name: Daily A/B Comparison

recommendations: Sample window is short. Expand daily logs to at least 252 trading days; target 756 days.
Attach fee/slippage fields to all daily logs (`results.backtest.totalCostBps`).
Persist `report.execution` every day, even when skipped, for audit completeness.

stages.name: Factor Mining

recommendations: Rolling Average improvement is statistically significant (Critical Luck excluded).
analyst.insights: Benchmark run completed with 99997 test points. Rolling Average shows -21104.2617 MAE improvement over Naive (t-stat=-10.84).
